edible_parts: Seeds (the original chia — gel drink, meal).
other_uses: Low desert sage with tiered blue flower clusters; the true native chia.
prep: Soak the mucilaginous seeds for a gelling energy drink or grind into 'pinole' meal — a legendary Southwestern endurance food (this is the native chia, kin to the crop chia). Fast, easy annual.
soil: Dry, sandy or gravelly, well-drained soils.
buy: Native-plant nurseries and native seed suppliers.
